description_long: This is a large, modern house surrounded by a dense ring of tall evergreen trees, providing privacy and a natural setting. The house features a flat roof with multiple levels and open terraces, some of which appear to have outdoor seating or recreational areas. The exterior is finished in a combination of dark and light materials, with large windows and clean, geometric lines. A driveway leads up to the main entrance, which is set back from the tree line, and there is a visible swimming pool area on one side. The structure is multi-storied, with a clear emphasis on horizontal and vertical planes, typical of contemporary architecture. The overall layout suggests spacious interiors and a strong connection to the surrounding landscape.
description: A large, modern multi-story house with flat roofs, expansive windows, and surrounded by tall evergreen trees. Features include a driveway, terraces, and a pool area, all set in a private, natural environment.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main driveway, entrance, and dense tree coverage around the house.
description_view_1: Rear/side view highlighting the pool area, open terraces, and more of the house's geometric layout.
description_view_2: Back view with a clear look at the flat roof, upper terraces, and symmetrical tree arrangement.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the house's multi-level structure and the surrounding trees, with less visibility of the pool.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a wide driveway, minimal steps, and a simple, modern door set back from the tree line, no porch or decorative columns.
